name: Salmon Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 can {7.5 oz.} salmon, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except butter.
Blend well to ensure even distribution of flavors and textures.
2. Shape the mixture into 4 patties using your hands for easy handling.
3. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Sauté the patties on both sides until they are golden brown and heated through.
